os.label: Founder OS
os.desc: The shell. Dispatches the fleet, holds the missions board, the digest, the activity stream.

os.label: Outreach OS
os.desc: Surface, research, draft, queue. Every send stops for approval. Offer is DRAFT: drafts only.

os.label: Growth OS
os.desc: Meta + Google + SEO. Campaign specs drafted and queued. No spend without approval.

os.label: Content OS
os.desc: IG / X / LinkedIn / YouTube. Hook to draft to review. Never publishes on its own.

os.label: Design OS
os.desc: Landing pages, creatives, decks. Rendered, QA'd, queued. Nothing ships to live without a go.

os.label: Ops OS
os.desc: CRM, automations, invoicing, integration health. Tests one real lead before anything goes live.

system.label: Brain OS
system.desc: The second brain: gBrain (local free embeddings) + Obsidian vault. The context every agent reads.

system.label: Kernel
system.desc: The spine: CLAUDE.md, SYSTEM.md, INVARIANTS.md, agency.yaml. Judgment encoded as blocking gates.

system.label: Schedules
system.desc: The always-on layer. External scheduler wakes headless runs; drafts queue; nothing sends.

cards.label: Launch campaign spec
cards.meta: held: economics gate + no pay link

activity.event: Orchestrated: 5 grounded assignments dispatched, 1 decision escalated to Sandy. Refused to fabricate a cold cohort.
Re-verified a firm from scratch, built earned evidence on its funnel, 2 drafts queued. Skipped unbacked pipeline rows. Nothing sent.
Launch campaign spec drafted and HELD: no expected CPL + no live pay link, so enable stays gated. No spend.
Build-in-public launch reel + carousel + caption drafted. Every rupee figure cut for lack of shareable proof.
QA'd the live dashboard 8.5/10. Caught a gate-count error (32 vs 48); fixed. Palette clean, zero teal.
Client balance reminder drafted, amount + date verified against two brain pages. Queued for approval, not sent.
Heartbeat live. Dreaming consolidated the brain (645 extracted, 729 embedded). Integrations 3/3 up.

gates.sample: Never invent case studies or numbers
No credentials or PII in outputs
